title: Add-project GitHub repo picker UI (frontend)
prompt:
Build the 'add project by picking an authorized GitHub repo' UI in web-ui (vault requirement 81a8d). Depends on the backend listing API task.

CONTEXT: add-project supports TWO coequal, coexisting methods. This task adds Method A WITHOUT removing or degrading Method B.

- Method A (this task): pick from authorized GitHub repos, auth-backed.
- Method B (already exists, keep as-is, FIRST-CLASS not a fallback): manual / paste-URL clone, needs no Kanban-side auth — public repos, Gitee/GitLab/self-hosted, etc. Must keep working exactly as today and remain available regardless of GitHub auth state.

Scope for Method A:
- In the add-project surface (the '+' add-project control in the unified Kanban-agent sidebar header — see decision f57b5), add a GitHub repo-picker path ALONGSIDE the existing manual / paste-URL option.
- VISIBILITY GATED ON AUTH: show the GitHub repo-picker entry ONLY when GitHub auth is set up (use the existing github.* status / use-github-auth hook). When NOT authenticated, the picker entry must be ABSENT — do not render a disabled control and do not render an inline 'log in first' prompt on this path. Authentication is done in Settings → GitHub git auth; once logged in, the picker appears. React to auth state so it appears/disappears live without a manual refresh. (Method B stays visible the whole time.)
- When shown, call the new backend listing endpoints to display authorized orgs/repos as candidates. Make it searchable/filterable for accounts with many repos; show private/public, default branch, description.
- Selecting a repo clones it over HTTPS (its HTTPS clone URL) through the existing add-project/clone path — reusing the github.com credential injection at runGit. Show clone progress + clear error mapping (git-clone.ts already maps auth failures).
- Follow web-ui conventions: Tailwind v4 tokens, Radix primitives, lucide icons, ui/ primitives, sonner toasts. No console.* (use the web-ui logger). Prefer react-use hooks.

Verify end-to-end where possible (or document manual steps): Method A picker appears on login and disappears on logout; Method B paste-URL clone still works unchanged in both auth states.
